titleStmt.title: SII 5.427: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 427. (A.R. No. 138 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakra vattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇḍyade- varkku yāṇṭu 10 1 vatu mārkaḻimāsattu Irupattiraṇ
ṭān tiyati kiḻvempanāṭṭut tirunelvelic cuttamallip perunteruvil vāṇiyarom pocala śrī vīrasomīścarade var
[śrī]karaṇattukkuk kaṭava varataṇṇateṇṭanāyakkarkkum toṇṭaimaṇṭalattu māriṅkūr Ōlaikaḷil cūriyatevaṉ kuma
rāḻvārkkum Ivar tampi kallaiyateṇṭanāyakkarkkum Ivar tampi Irāmaṇṇaṉukkum Ivvaṉaivarkkum piṭi
pāṭu kuṭutta paricāvatu Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyil garbhagṛṛha ttukkuḷ(ḷu)t tiruva
ṇukkan tiruvācalil veḷḷikkiḻamai viḷak mal yil tirununtāviḷakkāṉa tūkkuviḷakkukku
kuṭu roṭṭiyārai A ttirununtāviḷakkāl tūkkuviḷakku Oṉṟum nāyaṉār pāricattil
tirununtāviḷakkāṉa tūkkuviḷakku Oṉṟum Ākat tūkkuviḷakku Iraṇṭukkum nittal nimantamāka Aḷakku
m perummaṭiyeṇṇaiyoṭe cantrāditya vaṟ celvatāka nāḷ Oṉṟukku Aṉavaratāṉaṉāle A
ḷappomāṉa Eṇṇai Uri Ivveṇṇai Uriyum Aḷappatāka Emmilicainta poru ḷivar pak
kale koṇṭu Eṇṇai Aḷappomākavum Ippaṭi Emmilicainta poruḷ kaiyiṟk koṇṭu candrādityava
ṟ Eṇṇai Uriyum Aḷappomāṉamaikkuk kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvārākavum Ippaṭi
cammatittup piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭuttom vāṇiyarom varataṇṇataṇṭanāyakkarkkum kuma
rāḻvārkkum kallaiyateṇṭanāyakkarkkum Irāmaṇṇaṉukkum Ivvaṉaivarkkum . Ivai taṉmapotiya
rāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai nakaraceṉāpati Eḻuttu Ivai nantavattarāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai māpotiyarāya ṉeḻuttu
Ivai māṇikkavācaka ṉeḻuttu Ivai tanmapāla ṉeḻuttu Ivai vaiciyarāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai camaiyama
ntirieḻuttu Ivarkaḷ colla Ippiramāṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ Eḻuvaṉ cokkaṉāṉa māṇikkavācaka ṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.427 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
